qualifications.name: Bachelor of Social Work - Social Work
notes: Qualification code: B7025Q.
Qualification group: Bachelor of Social Work.
Campus: APK.
Career paths: Social Worker in private sector, Social Worker in welfare organisations, Social Worker in government organisations, Social Worker in non-governmental organisations.

Faculty notes: Due to limited space, fulfilling the minimum admission requirements does not guarantee acceptance into a programme; Extended programmes only consider new first-time entering candidates with no previous studies from a Higher Education Institution; Technical Mathematics is not accepted for the BA where applicable; Where Mathematics is selected as a major in the BA, the Faculty of Science minimum requirement for Grade 12 Mathematics level 4 (50%+) must be met.

NCV admission summary: NCV applicants are only considered for BA Extended, Diploma in Public Relations and Communication, and Extended Diploma in Public Relations and Communication; English as Language of Teaching and Learning or First Additional Language requires achievement rating 5; All other fundamental and vocational categories require achievement rating 4.

NASCA admission summary: NASCA applicants are only considered for the Diploma in Public Relations and Communication and the Extended Diploma in Public Relations and Communication; NASCA applicants must comply with faculty minimum admission requirements.

SC(a) admission summary: SC(a) applicants are only considered for BA Humanities Extended, Diploma in Public Relations and Communication, and Extended Diploma in Public Relations and Communication; Admission is Senate discretionary and requires Senate approval.
